'''âd-g-k-j''' ('''kadagkejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jarp|jarp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jarp|jarp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-g-k-j
|-
! Lemma
| kadagkejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidagkejoko|thidagkejoko]] || [[word:jidagkejoko|jidagkejoko]] || [[word:shidagkejoko|shidagkejoko]] || [[word:kidagkejoko|kidagkejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudagkejoko|thuthudagkejoko]] || [[word:jujudagkejoko|jujudagkejoko]] || [[word:shushudagkejoko|shushudagkejoko]] || [[word:kukudagkejoko|kukudagkejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudagkejoko|thudagkejoko]] || [[word:judagkejoko|judagkejoko]] || [[word:shudagkejoko|shudagkejoko]] || [[word:kudagkejoko|kudagkejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudagkejoko|thudagkejoko]] || [[word:judagkejoko|judagkejoko]] || [[word:shudagkejoko|shudagkejoko]] || [[word:kudagkejoko|kudagkejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedagkejoko|thedagkejoko]] || [[word:jedagkejoko|jedagkejoko]] || [[word:shedagkejoko|shedagkejoko]] || [[word:kedagkejoko|kedagkejoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodagkejoko|thodagkejoko]] || [[word:jodagkejoko|jodagkejoko]] || [[word:shodagkejoko|shodagkejoko]] || [[word:kodagkejoko|kodagkejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodagkejoko|thodagkejoko]] || [[word:jodagkejoko|jodagkejoko]] || [[word:shodagkejoko|shodagkejoko]] || [[word:kodagkejoko|kodagkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚdagkejoko|thĂŚdagkejoko]] || [[word:jĂŚdagkejoko|jĂŚdagkejoko]] || [[word:shĂŚdagkejoko|shĂŚdagkejoko]] || [[word:kĂŚdagkejoko|kĂŚdagkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadagkejoko|thathadagkejoko]] || [[word:jajadagkejoko|jajadagkejoko]] || [[word:shashadagkejoko|shashadagkejoko]] || [[word:kakadagkejoko|kakadagkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadagkejoko|thadagkejoko]] || [[word:jadagkejoko|jadagkejoko]] || [[word:shadagkejoko|shadagkejoko]] || [[word:kadagkejoko|kadagkejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadagkejoko|thadagkejoko]] || [[word:jadagkejoko|jadagkejoko]] || [[word:shadagkejoko|shadagkejoko]] || [[word:kadagkejoko|kadagkejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadagkejithi|shadagkejithi]] || [[word:shadagkejiji|shadagkejiji]] || [[word:shadagkejishi|shadagkejishi]] || [[word:shadagkejiki|shadagkejiki]]
